tasks.label: Build libanvil.a (static)
args: mkdir -p build bin && gcc -std=c2x -Wall -Wextra -Werror -O0 -fPIC -g -Iinclude -c src/core/anvil.c -o build/anvil.o && gcc -std=c2x -Wall -Wextra -Werror -O0 -fPIC -g -Iinclude -c src/core/parser.c -o build/parser.o && gcc -std=c2x -Wall -Wextra -Werror -O0 -fPIC -g -Iinclude -c src/core/resolver.c -o build/resolver.o && gcc -std=c2x -Wall -Wextra -Werror -O0 -fPIC -g -Iinclude -c src/core/context.c -o build/context.o && gcc -std=c2x -Wall -Wextra -Werror -O0 -fPIC -g -Iinclude -c src/core/types.c -o build/types.o && gcc -std=c2x -Wall -Wextra -Werror -O0 -fPIC -g -Iinclude -c src/core/writer.c -o build/writer.o && gcc -std=c2x -Wall -Wextra -Werror -O0 -fPIC -g -Iinclude -c src/core/operators.c -o build/operators.o && gcc -std=c2x -Wall -Wextra -Werror -O0 -fPIC -g -Iinclude -c src/core/symbols.c -o build/symbols.o && gcc -std=c2x -Wall -Wextra -Werror -O0 -fPIC -g -Iinclude -c src/core/errors.c -o build/errors.o && gcc -std=c2x -Wall -Wextra -Werror -O0 -fPIC -g -Iinclude -c src/utilities/utils.c -o build/utils.o && ar rcs bin/libanvil.a build/anvil.o build/parser.o build/resolver.o build/context.o build/types.o build/writer.o build/operators.o build/symbols.o build/errors.o build/utils.o

tasks.label: Build libanvil.so (shared)
args: mkdir -p build bin && gcc -std=c2x -Wall -Wextra -Werror -O0 -fPIC -g -Iinclude -c src/core/anvil.c -o build/anvil.o && gcc -std=c2x -Wall -Wextra -Werror -O0 -fPIC -g -Iinclude -c src/core/parser.c -o build/parser.o && gcc -std=c2x -Wall -Wextra -Werror -O0 -fPIC -g -Iinclude -c src/core/resolver.c -o build/resolver.o && gcc -std=c2x -Wall -Wextra -Werror -O0 -fPIC -g -Iinclude -c src/core/context.c -o build/context.o && gcc -std=c2x -Wall -Wextra -Werror -O0 -fPIC -g -Iinclude -c src/core/types.c -o build/types.o && gcc -std=c2x -Wall -Wextra -Werror -O0 -fPIC -g -Iinclude -c src/core/writer.c -o build/writer.o && gcc -std=c2x -Wall -Wextra -Werror -O0 -fPIC -g -Iinclude -c src/core/operators.c -o build/operators.o && gcc -std=c2x -Wall -Wextra -Werror -O0 -fPIC -g -Iinclude -c src/core/symbols.c -o build/symbols.o && gcc -std=c2x -Wall -Wextra -Werror -O0 -fPIC -g -Iinclude -c src/core/errors.c -o build/errors.o && gcc -std=c2x -Wall -Wextra -Werror -O0 -fPIC -g -Iinclude -c src/utilities/utils.c -o build/utils.o && gcc -shared -o bin/libanvil.so build/anvil.o build/parser.o build/resolver.o build/context.o build/types.o build/writer.o build/operators.o build/symbols.o build/errors.o build/utils.o
